stemHtml: Which statement is true about EASA implementing rules?

options.a: They are binding in their entirety and used to specify a high and uniform level of safety and uniform conformity and compliance. The IRs are adopted by the european commission in the form of regulations.
options.b: They are binding explanatory and interpretation material on how to achieve the requirements contained in the basic regulation, the IRs, the AMCs and the CSs. It contains information, including examples, to assist the user in the interpretation and application of the basic regulation, its IRs, AMCs and the CSs.
options.c: They are non-binding technical standards adopted by the EASA to meet the essential requirements of the basic regulation.
options.d: They are non-binding special detailed technical specifications determined by the NAA for an aerodrome.
